## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## User Need

Who needs this and what problem does it solve?

## Proposed Approach

Describe the preferred behavior or workflow.

## Project Boundaries

Confirm how this preserves:

- Free-first barter access
- Approximate-only public location
- No user-to-user payments, credits, escrow, settlement, exchange valuation, or completed-exchange accounting
- RLS-first data access
- Adult-only participation

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler or safer alternatives.
